title: celtis djungiel
intro: Celtis djungiel, also known as the Jungay or Desert Ironwood, is a small to medium-sized tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of Celtis djungiel include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and support the overall well-being of the body. The herbal preparations of Celtis djungiel can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote healing.
